ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "water_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water point the record is associated with */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., repair, inspection) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_team" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance team */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "condition_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the water point's condition */,
  "status_impact" TEXT /* Impact on the water point's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality test */,
  "water_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water point the test is associated with */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water */,
  "bacteria_count" INTEGER /* Bacteria count in the water */,
  "chlorine_level" REAL /* Chlorine level in the water */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the water quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "water_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water point the feedback is associated with */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., complaint, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_details" TEXT /* Details of the feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicator if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field worker, maintenance team, community leader) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each maintenance record
ID of the water point the record is associated with
Assessment of the water point's condition
Impact on the water point's status
Unique identifier for each water quality test
ID of the water point the test is associated with
Unique identifier for each feedback record
ID of the water point the feedback is associated with
Indicator if the feedback has been resolved
Role of the user (e.g., field worker, maintenance team, community leader)
